---
title: "Media and teaching"
author: ""
comments: false
citation: false
description: |
  This portfolio compiles media and public outreach activities across television, radio, <br> and social media, alongside openly available educational materials.
listing: 
  contents:
    - "/*/index.qmd"
    - "/*/index.markdown"
    - "/*/index.md"
  type: grid
  fields: [title, categories, date, image]
  sort: "date desc"
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: 250px        
  grid-columns: 3            
  grid-item-align: center    
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="../assets/listing-default.css">
  <link rel="" href="../assets/custom-css.js"> 
resources:
  - ../assets/listing-default.css
  - ../assets/custom-css.js
---
